claims.claim_text: Gujarat Titans missed out on a chance to become the first team to seal qualification to the playoffs.
claims.evidence_text: Gujarat Titans missed out on a chance to become the first team to seal qualification to the playoffs in the 2026 season of the Indian Premier League (IPL) as they lost their Saturday night fixture against the Kolkata Knight Riders by six 29 runs.

claims.claim_text: Sai Sudharsan is currently leading the Orange Cap list.
Rashid Khan slipped to fifth in the Purple Cap race.
claims.evidence_text: Rashid Khan slipped to fifth due to his economy rate falling behind that of Prince Yadav.
